since_last: 43% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.62%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 43% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.93% · BTC -1.82% · Gold -2.15% · Nasdaq100 -1.36%. 43% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.62%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.62%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.16%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -12.59%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +7.38%, HON +7.14%, SKHY +5.78%, SMCI +5.19%, FIX +4.37%. Laggards: TSLA -12.59%, GOOGL -6.23%, UPST -4.05%, AMZN -3.87%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.45% at $113.59
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.45% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
